title: FG_ForceCheckMode Property
description:
For the end conditions related to force, this property sets a direction which will be a condition.

Values

Press Direction (Press+, Press-) specified by ControlMode is a force condition.

PressFollow Direction (Press+, Press-, and Follow) specified by ControlMode is a force condition.

Default:  False
see_also:
Applies To

Press Object, PressMove Object
 Property

ForceCheckEnabled Property
